ideation: This sequence depicts the robot admiring a majestic snow-capped mountain. The animation will start with the robot's arms at its sides, then raise them in awe, and finally bring them back down to a relaxed position. The robot's posture should convey wonder and appreciation of the mountain's grandeur. I'll focus on creating a smooth, expressive arm movement that mimics the feeling of looking up at something tall and impressive. The arms will move slightly independently, adding a natural touch to the animation. I'll check the examples to ensure the arm movements are within the robot's capabilities and look natural.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to admire
both arms rise slowly, reaching for the sky
arms lower slightly, taking in the view
arms return to rest, the mountain's majesty remains
